topPick.name: United Airlines Holdings
topPick.thesis: United Airlines Holdings (UAL) is trading at 12.1x P/E, a 62% discount to its sector average of 31.9x; RSI at 87 reflects strong but extended momentum — watch for potential consolidation. Three-month price momentum of +42.1% reflects exceptional institutional accumulation, with EPS growing +84% year-on-year, underpinned by a bullish MACD crossover confirming upward price pressure. Composite score of 73/100 places UAL in the top 1% of S&P 500 constituents across all four analytical strategies, outperforming its sector by +30.3% over the past quarter.
